name: Honey Almond
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons slivered almonds, toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the plain nonfat yogurt, toasted chopped slivered almonds, and honey.
2. Stir or whisk until all ingredients are well mixed and smooth.
3. The mixture will yield about 3/4 cup.
